title: Webhook for subitem update object deleted
excerpt:
Hi there. 
I have a webhook that fires when an update is created on an subitem. But there doesn’t seem to be a webhook that would fire when an upadte on an subitem is deleted. 
Would appreciate any help.

posts.author: Doka (Dominik Kukovec)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there.
I have a webhook that fires when an update is created on an subitem. But there doesn’t seem to be a webhook that would fire when an upadte on an subitem is deleted.
Would appreciate any help.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Doka,

As of today such webhook does not exist.

I have turned this into a request so that our team is in the loop, and so others can vote for it

Cheers,
Matias
